title: tutorial
text: kwb.tenders automates checking German public procurement portals (“Vergabeportale”) tenders relevant KWB research topics. first supported portal Vergabemarktplatz Brandenburg (VMP-BB). Pipeline: open browser → scrape published tenders → score relevance (groundwater keywords) → write Excel + Markdown report flags new since previous run. browser driven directly via chromote (headless), works locally headless CI runners.

title: tutorial
text: writes reports/vmp-bb_<date>.xlsx (sheets Relevant / Alle / Neu) reports/latest.md.
code: check_tenders()                  # public search, all pages check_tenders(max_pages = 2)     # quick test (first 2 pages)

title: tutorial
text: public tender search returns results without logging , check_tenders() log default. valid credentials want log (env vars VMP_BB_USERNAME / VMP_BB_PASSWORD, e.g. ~/.Renviron):
code: check_tenders(login = TRUE)

title: tutorial
code: session <- vmp_bb_session() # vmp_bb_login(session)                       # optional tenders <- vmp_bb_scrape_tenders(session, max_pages = 2)  scored <- score_relevance(tenders) write_tender_report(scored)  session$close() # session$view()   # open a live view of the headless session in your browser

title: tutorial
text: Tenders scored KWB research groups relevant tender tagged (column groups) matching group(s). keyword lists live inst/extdata/keywords_<slug>.yml – one file per group, display name strong / supporting vectors. tender matches group contains least one strong keyword least two supporting keywords, relevant matches least one group. Matching case-insensitive folds umlauts (“Klärschlamm” “Klaerschlamm” match). Edit inst/extdata/keywords_<slug>.yml files tune keywords, add new file add group – code change needed.
code: kw <- tender_keywords() names(kw)        # the research-group slugs str(kw$groundwater)  # Score against a custom subset (e.g. only two groups): scored <- score_relevance(tenders, keywords = kw[c("groundwater", "water-risk")])

title: tutorial
text: Beyond result-table title (layer 1), check_tenders(screen_details = TRUE) (default) opens ongoing tender’s public detail page matches full description text plus CPV procurement codes (mapped groups via inst/extdata/cpv_groups.yml). report’s match_source column shows layer flagged tender (title / detail / cpv). needs login (detail page public). scheduled job caches detail results (gh-pages) deep-screens new tenders, daily runs stay cheap coverage grows; cap per-run fetches max_detail.
code: check_tenders(screen_details = TRUE, max_detail = 50)

title: tutorial
text: workflow .github/workflows/check-tenders.yaml runs check_tenders() schedule (weekdays, 05:00 UTC default), commits updated report repository uploads Excel file build artifact. Change cron: expression adjust frequency.

title: R Package for Automated Monitoring of German Public Procurement Portals (Vergabeportale) for KWB-Relevant Tenders
text: details install KWB-R packages checkout installation tutorial.
code: ### Optionally: specify GitHub Personal Access Token (GITHUB_PAT) ### See here why this might be important for you: ### https://kwb-r.github.io/kwb.pkgbuild/articles/install.html#set-your-github_pat  # Sys.setenv(GITHUB_PAT = "mysecret_access_token")  # Install package "remotes" from CRAN if (! require("remotes")) {   install.packages("remotes", repos = "https://cloud.r-project.org") }  # Install KWB package 'kwb.tenders' from GitHub remotes::install_github("KWB-R/kwb.tenders")

what: Veto out-of-scope tenders (construction / building / maintenance) — apply_title_excludes
title: Veto out-of-scope tenders (construction / building / maintenance) — apply_title_excludes
text: Drops tenders fit research institute, two ways: title contains building/maintenance term (see tender_excludes()) strong water keyword rescues ("Grundwasser..." title kept); CPV shows works / maintenance / cleaning code (45... Bau, 50... Reparatur/Wartung, 9046/9047/9061/9064/9091... Reinigung) without engineering-services code (71...); hard veto, even "Neubau Klaeranlage" "Reinigung Faulbehaelter" dropped "Ingenieurleistungen ..." stays. Sets is_relevant = FALSE records reason excluded column. Matching folds umlauts / case-insensitive.

title: Veto out-of-scope tenders (construction / building / maintenance) — apply_title_excludes
code: apply_title_excludes(   df,   title_cols = c("Kurzbezeichnung", "Bezeichnung", "Titel"),   keywords = tender_keywords(),   excludes = tender_excludes() )

title: Veto out-of-scope tenders (construction / building / maintenance) — apply_title_excludes
text: df scored tibble (must contain is_relevant). title_cols Candidate title columns (present used). keywords Keyword groups, strong-keyword rescue (default tender_keywords()). excludes Exclusion list (default tender_excludes()).

title: Veto out-of-scope tenders (construction / building / maintenance) — apply_title_excludes
text: df vetoed rows' is_relevant set FALSE excluded column.

what: Check Vergabemarktplatz Brandenburg for relevant tenders (single-portal report) — check_tenders
title: Check Vergabemarktplatz Brandenburg for relevant tenders (single-portal report) — check_tenders
text: Convenience wrapper around vmp_bb_tenders() also writes overview report. combined multi-portal run see screen_all_portals().

title: Check Vergabemarktplatz Brandenburg for relevant tenders (single-portal report) — check_tenders
code: check_tenders(   dir = "reports",   headless = TRUE,   login = FALSE,   max_pages = Inf,   publication_types = c("ExAnte", "Tender"),   contracting_rules = "VOL",   screen_details = TRUE,   max_detail = Inf,   screen_notice = FALSE,   max_notice = Inf,   username = Sys.getenv("VMP_BB_USERNAME"),   password = Sys.getenv("VMP_BB_PASSWORD"),   keywords = tender_keywords() )

title: Check Vergabemarktplatz Brandenburg for relevant tenders (single-portal report) — check_tenders
text: dir Output directory report caches (default "reports"). headless Run chromote headless (default TRUE). login Log scraping (default FALSE; search public). max_pages Maximum number result pages scrape (default Inf). publication_types, contracting_rules Search filter passed vmp_bb_scrape_tenders(). screen_details Detail-page layer (default TRUE; see enrich_with_details()). max_detail Maximum number detail pages screen (default Inf). screen_notice Notice-PDF layer (default FALSE; forces login = TRUE; see enrich_with_notice()). max_notice Maximum number new notice PDFs read (default Inf). username, password Credentials login = TRUE (default env vars VMP_BB_USERNAME / VMP_BB_PASSWORD). keywords Keyword list relevance scoring (default tender_keywords()).

title: Check Vergabemarktplatz Brandenburg for relevant tenders (single-portal report) — check_tenders
text: Invisibly, scored tibble tenders.

title: Check Vergabemarktplatz Brandenburg for relevant tenders (single-portal report) — check_tenders
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ check_tenders() # public search, all pages check_tenders(max_pages = 2) # quick test } # }

what: Combine scored tender tibbles from several portal connectors — combine_tenders
title: Combine scored tender tibbles from several portal connectors — combine_tenders
text: Row-binds per-portal results, filling columns absent sources NA, guarantees Plattform column. input scored tibble (see score_relevance()) returned portal connector.

title: Combine scored tender tibbles from several portal connectors — combine_tenders
code: combine_tenders(tenders_list)

title: Combine scored tender tibbles from several portal connectors — combine_tenders
text: tenders_list list data frames (one per portal). NULL entries zero-row frames dropped.

title: Combine scored tender tibbles from several portal connectors — combine_tenders
text: One combined data frame (empty data frame inputs empty).

title: Combine scored tender tibbles from several portal connectors — combine_tenders
code: a <- data.frame(Plattform = "A", Kurzbezeichnung = "x", stringsAsFactors = FALSE) b <- data.frame(Plattform = "B", cpv = "71351500-8", stringsAsFactors = FALSE) combine_tenders(list(a, b)) #>   Plattform Kurzbezeichnung        cpv #> 1         A               x       <NA> #> 2         B            <NA> 71351500-8

what: CPV code -> German label lookup — cpv_labels
title: CPV code -> German label lookup — cpv_labels
text: Reads bundled CPV label table (inst/extdata/cpv_labels.csv, columns code, name). Edit/extend file (drop full official CPV list) cover codes.

title: CPV code -> German label lookup — cpv_labels
code: cpv_labels(   path = system.file("extdata", "cpv_labels.csv", package = "kwb.tenders") )

title: CPV code -> German label lookup — cpv_labels
text: path CSV file columns code, name.

title: CPV code -> German label lookup — cpv_labels
text: named character vector (names = CPV codes, values = German labels).

title: CPV code -> German label lookup — cpv_labels
code: head(cpv_labels()) #>                                                                                                                 03000000-1  #> "Landwirtschaftliche Erzeugnisse des Pflanzenbaus und der Tierhaltung sowie Fischerei-, Forst- und zugehörige Erzeugnisse"  #>                                                                                                                 03100000-2  #>                                                                                "Landwirtschafts- und Gartenbauerzeugnisse"  #>                                                                                                                 03110000-5  #>                                                                        "Feldfrüchte und Erzeugnisse des Erwerbsgartenbaus"  #>                                                                                                                 03111000-2  #>                                                                                                                  "Saatgut"  #>                                                                                                                 03111100-3  #>                                                                                                               "Sojabohnen"  #>                                                                                                                 03111200-4  #>                                                                                                                 "Erdnüsse"

what: Summarise all CPV codes found across the tenders — cpv_summary
title: Summarise all CPV codes found across the tenders — cpv_summary
text: Aggregates CPV codes collected enrich_with_details() table: one row per code (cpv_id) German label (cpv_name, via cpv_labels()), number tenders appears (n_tenders) KWB research group(s) maps (groups). Used "CPV" sheet report.

title: Summarise all CPV codes found across the tenders — cpv_summary
code: cpv_summary(   tenders,   cpv_map = tender_cpv_map(),   keywords = tender_keywords(),   labels = cpv_labels() )

title: Summarise all CPV codes found across the tenders — cpv_summary
text: tenders tibble cpv column (comma-separated CPV codes). cpv_map CPV--group mapping (default tender_cpv_map()). keywords Keyword groups, group display names (default tender_keywords()). labels CPV code -> name lookup (default cpv_labels()).

title: Summarise all CPV codes found across the tenders — cpv_summary
text: data.frame columns cpv_id, cpv_name, n_tenders, groups, sorted descending frequency.

title: Summarise all CPV codes found across the tenders — cpv_summary
code: cpv_summary(data.frame(cpv = c("90700000-4, 90733000-4", "90700000-4"))) #>       cpv_id                                                 cpv_name n_tenders #> 1 90700000-4                         Dienstleistungen im Umweltschutz         2 #> 2 90733000-4 Dienstleistungen im Zusammenhang mit Wasserverschmutzung         1 #>                                    groups #> 1 Regenwasser & Gewässer, Wasser & Risiko #> 2     Regenwasser & Gewässer, Grundwasser

what: Enrich tenders with a detail-page relevance layer (rendered text + CPV codes) — enrich_with_details
title: Enrich tenders with a detail-page relevance layer (rendered text + CPV codes) — enrich_with_details
text: ongoing tenders yet cache, renders public detail page via session, matches keyword groups full text maps CPV codes groups. Cached tenders reused without re-fetching. matching group(s) merged groups/is_relevant; adds columns detail_groups, cpv, cpv_groups, match_source. updated cache returned attr(result, "detail_cache").

title: Enrich tenders with a detail-page relevance layer (rendered text + CPV codes) — enrich_with_details
code: enrich_with_details(   session,   tenders,   keywords = tender_keywords(),   cpv_map = tender_cpv_map(),   ongoing_only = TRUE,   max_detail = Inf,   delay = 0.2,   cache = NULL )

title: Enrich tenders with a detail-page relevance layer (rendered text + CPV codes) — enrich_with_details
text: session session vmp_bb_session(). tenders scored tibble (see score_relevance()). keywords Keyword groups (default tender_keywords()). cpv_map CPV--group mapping (default tender_cpv_map()). ongoing_only screen tenders whose deadline passed (default TRUE). max_detail Maximum number new detail pages render per call (default Inf). delay Seconds detail pages (politeness; default 0.2). cache Detail cache previous run (see read_detail_cache()).

title: Enrich tenders with a detail-page relevance layer (rendered text + CPV codes) — enrich_with_details
text: tenders detail layer merged ; updated cache attr(result, "detail_cache").

what: Enrich tenders with a notice-PDF (Bekanntmachung) relevance layer — enrich_with_notice
title: Enrich tenders with a notice-PDF (Bekanntmachung) relevance layer — enrich_with_notice
text: ongoing tenders yet cached, reads published announcement PDF(s) via logged-session matches keyword groups text. Adds notice_groups column, merges groups/is_relevant adds notice source match_source. Requires logged-session. updated cache returned attr(result, "notice_cache").

title: Enrich tenders with a notice-PDF (Bekanntmachung) relevance layer — enrich_with_notice
code: enrich_with_notice(   session,   tenders,   keywords = tender_keywords(),   ongoing_only = TRUE,   max_notice = Inf,   delay = 0.3,   cache = NULL )

title: Enrich tenders with a notice-PDF (Bekanntmachung) relevance layer — enrich_with_notice
text: session logged-session vmp_bb_session(). tenders tibble (typically already passed enrich_with_details()). keywords Keyword groups (default tender_keywords()). ongoing_only screen ongoing tenders (default TRUE). max_notice Maximum number new notice PDFs read (default Inf). delay Seconds tenders (default 0.3). cache Notice cache previous run (see read_notice_cache()).

title: Enrich tenders with a notice-PDF (Bekanntmachung) relevance layer — enrich_with_notice
text: tenders notice layer merged .

what: kwb.tenders: R Package for Automated Monitoring of German Public Procurement Portals (Vergabeportale) for KWB-Relevant Tenders — kwb.tenders-package
title: kwb.tenders: R Package for Automated Monitoring of German Public Procurement Portals (Vergabeportale) for KWB-Relevant Tenders — kwb.tenders-package
text: Logs public procurement portals (starting Vergabemarktplatz Brandenburg), scrapes published tenders, scores relevance KWB research topics (e.g. groundwater) renders overview report.

title: kwb.tenders: R Package for Automated Monitoring of German Public Procurement Portals (Vergabeportale) for KWB-Relevant Tenders — kwb.tenders-package
text: Maintainer: Michael Rustler michael.rustler@kompetenz-wasser.de (ORCID) Authors: Michael Rustler michael.rustler@kompetenz-wasser.de (ORCID) contributors: Kompetenzzentrum Wasser Berlin gGmbH (KWB) [copyright holder]

what: Screen the Datenservice Oeffentlicher Einkauf (oeffentlichevergabe.de) — oeffentlichevergabe_tenders
title: Screen the Datenservice Oeffentlicher Einkauf (oeffentlichevergabe.de) — oeffentlichevergabe_tenders
text: Login-free connector: downloads OCDS notice export last days days, parses notice scores score_layered() (title full rule, description strong-, CPV mapped). Returns relevant tenders Plattform column, ready combine_tenders() / write_tender_report().

title: Screen the Datenservice Oeffentlicher Einkauf (oeffentlichevergabe.de) — oeffentlichevergabe_tenders
code: oeffentlichevergabe_tenders(   keywords = tender_keywords(),   cpv_map = tender_cpv_map(),   days = 7,   end = Sys.Date(),   relevant_only = TRUE,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Screen the Datenservice Oeffentlicher Einkauf (oeffentlichevergabe.de) — oeffentlichevergabe_tenders
text: keywords Keyword groups (default tender_keywords()). cpv_map CPV--group map (default tender_cpv_map()). days Number past days fetch (default 7; API serves data previous day). end recent date consider (default Sys.Date()). relevant_only Keep relevant tenders (default TRUE). verbose Print per-day progress (default TRUE).

title: Screen the Datenservice Oeffentlicher Einkauf (oeffentlichevergabe.de) — oeffentlichevergabe_tenders
text: scored tibble (relevant) tenders; empty data frame none.

title: Screen the Datenservice Oeffentlicher Einkauf (oeffentlichevergabe.de) — oeffentlichevergabe_tenders
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ oeffentlichevergabe_tenders(days = 3) } # }

what: Read / write the detail-screening cache — read_detail_cache
title: Read / write the detail-screening cache — read_detail_cache
text: cache (one row per already-screened tender) lets scheduled job screen new tenders reuse earlier results; persisted report survives across runs.

title: Read / write the detail-screening cache — read_detail_cache
code: read_detail_cache(path)  write_detail_cache(cache, path)

title: Read / write the detail-screening cache — read_detail_cache
text: path Cache file path (.rds). cache cache data.frame (columns tender_id, detail_groups, cpv, cpv_groups).

title: Read / write the detail-screening cache — read_detail_cache
text: read_detail_cache() returns cache data.frame (empty absent); write_detail_cache() returns path invisibly.

what: Read / write the notice-screening cache — read_notice_cache
title: Read / write the notice-screening cache — read_notice_cache
text: Read / write notice-screening cache

title: Read / write the notice-screening cache — read_notice_cache
code: read_notice_cache(path)  write_notice_cache(cache, path)

title: Read / write the notice-screening cache — read_notice_cache
text: path Cache file path (.rds). cache cache data.frame (tender_id, notice_groups).

title: Read / write the notice-screening cache — read_notice_cache
text: read_notice_cache() data.frame (empty absent); write_notice_cache() returns path invisibly.

what: Layered relevance scoring for portal connectors (title + long text + CPV) — score_layered
title: Layered relevance scoring for portal connectors (title + long text + CPV) — score_layered
text: Scores tender tibble way VMP-BB pipeline , one call connectors already ship description CPV codes (e.g. API portals): title_cols use full rule (>=1 strong >=2 supporting), text_cols (long free text) matched STRONG-(incidental supporting hits long text noise), cpv_col codes mapped groups. three group sets merged groups, match_source (title/detail/cpv), cpv_groups, score is_relevant.

title: Layered relevance scoring for portal connectors (title + long text + CPV) — score_layered
code: score_layered(   df,   title_cols,   text_cols = character(),   cpv_col = NULL,   keywords = tender_keywords(),   cpv_map = tender_cpv_map(),   exclude = TRUE )

title: Layered relevance scoring for portal connectors (title + long text + CPV) — score_layered
text: df data frame tenders. title_cols Columns scored full rule (e.g. title). text_cols Columns scored strong-(e.g. description); default none. cpv_col Name comma/space-separated CPV column, NULL. keywords Keyword groups (default tender_keywords()). cpv_map CPV--group map (default tender_cpv_map()). exclude Apply apply_title_excludes() afterwards drop construction / building / maintenance tenders (default TRUE).

title: Layered relevance scoring for portal connectors (title + long text + CPV) — score_layered
text: df groups, cpv_groups, match_source, score, is_relevant added, sorted descending score.

what: Score tenders for relevance to KWB research groups — score_relevance
title: Score tenders for relevance to KWB research groups — score_relevance
text: Case-insensitive substring matching group's keywords character columns. tender matches group contains least one strong keyword least two supporting keywords; relevant matches least one group.

title: Score tenders for relevance to KWB research groups — score_relevance
code: score_relevance(tenders, keywords = tender_keywords())

title: Score tenders for relevance to KWB research groups — score_relevance
text: tenders data frame / tibble tenders (e.g. vmp_bb_scrape_tenders()). keywords Keyword groups (default tender_keywords()). May also single group list(strong = ..., supporting = ...).

title: Score tenders for relevance to KWB research groups — score_relevance
text: tenders added columns groups (matching group names, comma separated), matched_keywords, score is_relevant, sorted descending score.

title: Score tenders for relevance to KWB research groups — score_relevance
code: df <- data.frame(   Bezeichnung = c("Grundwassermonitoring Brunnen", "Kanalsanierung Sensorik"),   stringsAsFactors = FALSE ) res <- score_relevance(df) res[, c("Bezeichnung", "groups", "score")] #>                     Bezeichnung                     groups score #> 1 Grundwassermonitoring Brunnen                Grundwasser     5 #> 2       Kanalsanierung Sensorik Smart City & Infrastruktur     4

what: Screen all configured portals into one combined report — screen_all_portals
title: Screen all configured portals into one combined report — screen_all_portals
text: Convenience entry point (used scheduled GitHub Action): wires built-connectors – Vergabe Brandenburg (vmp_bb_tenders()), federal Datenservice (oeffentlichevergabe_tenders()) TED (ted_tenders()) – runs screen_portals(). VMP-BB can use login; API portals login-free, portal fails skipped (others still produce report).

title: Screen all configured portals into one combined report — screen_all_portals
code: screen_all_portals(   dir = "reports",   vmp_bb = TRUE,   oeffentlichevergabe = TRUE,   ted = TRUE,   vmp_bb_login = FALSE,   vmp_bb_notice = FALSE,   oeffentlichevergabe_days = 8,   ted_since_days = 90,   keywords = tender_keywords(),   verbose = TRUE )

title: Screen all configured portals into one combined report — screen_all_portals
text: dir Output directory (default "reports"). vmp_bb, oeffentlichevergabe, ted Enable source (TRUE). vmp_bb_login, vmp_bb_notice Log / read notice PDFs VMP-BB (default FALSE; need VMP_BB_* secrets). oeffentlichevergabe_days Days OCDS notices fetch (default 8). ted_since_days TED look-back window days (default 90). keywords Keyword groups (default tender_keywords()). verbose Print progress (default TRUE).

title: Screen all configured portals into one combined report — screen_all_portals
text: Invisibly, combined scored tibble.

title: Screen all configured portals into one combined report — screen_all_portals
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ screen_all_portals(vmp_bb_login = TRUE, vmp_bb_notice = TRUE) } # }

what: Run several portal connectors, combine and write one report — screen_portals
title: Run several portal connectors, combine and write one report — screen_portals
text: Calls source connector (function returning scored tender tibble), tagging Plattform, combines results combine_tenders() writes one report via write_tender_report(). source errors logged skipped, one portal failing abort run.

title: Run several portal connectors, combine and write one report — screen_portals
code: screen_portals(   sources,   dir = "reports",   portal = "tenders",   keywords = tender_keywords(),   keep_types = c("Ausschreibung", "Geplante Ausschreibung"),   verbose = TRUE )

title: Run several portal connectors, combine and write one report — screen_portals
text: sources named list functions, returning scored tibble (e.g. list("TED" = function() ted_tenders())). name used Plattform connector set one. dir Output directory (default "reports"). portal File-name id combined report (default "tenders"). keywords Passed connectors take (currently informational). keep_types Keep Veroeffentlichungstyp values (default biddable ones -> drops "Vergebener Auftrag"/awards). NULL keeps . verbose Print progress (default TRUE).

title: Run several portal connectors, combine and write one report — screen_portals
text: Invisibly, combined scored tibble.

title: Run several portal connectors, combine and write one report — screen_portals
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ screen_portals(list(   "Oeffentliche Vergabe" = function() oeffentlichevergabe_tenders(days = 7),   "TED" = function() ted_tenders() )) } # }

what: Screen TED (Tenders Electronic Daily) for relevant tenders — ted_tenders
title: Screen TED (Tenders Electronic Daily) for relevant tenders — ted_tenders
text: Login-free EU connector. Full-text queries terms (German water terms) restricted countries, fetches matching notices scores score_layered(). Returns relevant tenders Plattform column.

title: Screen TED (Tenders Electronic Daily) for relevant tenders — ted_tenders
code: ted_tenders(   keywords = tender_keywords(),   cpv_map = tender_cpv_map(),   terms = ted_default_terms(),   countries = "DEU",   since_days = 90,   scope = "ACTIVE",   max_pages = 5,   page_size = 100,   relevant_only = TRUE,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Screen TED (Tenders Electronic Daily) for relevant tenders — ted_tenders
text: keywords Keyword groups (default tender_keywords()). cpv_map CPV--group map (default tender_cpv_map()). terms Full-text query terms (default: built-water-term set). countries Place--performance country codes (default "DEU"; NULL/character() EU-wide). since_days notices published within last N days (default 90, via TED today(-N)); NULL disable. Past-deadline notices dropped . scope Notice scope ("ACTIVE", "", "LATEST"; default "ACTIVE"). max_pages, page_size Pagination caps (default 5 x 100). relevant_only Keep relevant tenders (default TRUE). verbose Print progress (default TRUE).

title: Screen TED (Tenders Electronic Daily) for relevant tenders — ted_tenders
text: scored tibble (relevant) tenders; empty data frame none.

title: Screen TED (Tenders Electronic Daily) for relevant tenders — ted_tenders
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ ted_tenders(max_pages = 1) } # }

title: CPV-code to research-group mapping — tender_cpv_map
text: CPV-code research-group mapping

title: CPV-code to research-group mapping — tender_cpv_map
code: tender_cpv_map(   path = system.file("extdata", "cpv_groups.yml", package = "kwb.tenders") )

title: CPV-code to research-group mapping — tender_cpv_map
text: path YAML file mapping CPV prefixes group slugs (inst/extdata/cpv_groups.yml).

title: CPV-code to research-group mapping — tender_cpv_map
text: list entries, list prefix groups.

title: CPV-code to research-group mapping — tender_cpv_map

what: Fetch a tender detail page (rendered) and extract its text + CPV codes — tender_detail_text
title: Fetch a tender detail page (rendered) and extract its text + CPV codes — tender_detail_text

text: list text (rendered page text) cpv (character vector).

title: Title-level exclusion (veto) terms — tender_excludes
text: Reads inst/extdata/keywords_exclude.yml – terms mark tender relevant appear title (strong water keyword ). Used apply_title_excludes(). file deliberately ignored tender_keywords(); research group.

title: Title-level exclusion (veto) terms — tender_excludes
code: tender_excludes(   path = system.file("extdata", "keywords_exclude.yml", package = "kwb.tenders") )

text: path YAML file terms: list (optional name).

title: Title-level exclusion (veto) terms — tender_excludes
text: list name terms (character vector).

title: KWB research-group keywords — tender_keywords
text: Reads keyword lists KWB research groups shipped package (inst/extdata/keywords.yml). group display name strong / supporting keyword vectors.

title: KWB research-group keywords — tender_keywords
code: tender_keywords(dir = system.file("extdata", package = "kwb.tenders"))

title: KWB research-group keywords — tender_keywords
text: dir Directory holding per-group keyword files (keywords_<slug>.yml, one file per research group).

title: KWB research-group keywords — tender_keywords
text: named list groups (named slug), list name, strong, supporting.

what: Fetch and extract the text of a tender's announcement (notice) PDF(s) — tender_notice_text
title: Fetch and extract the text of a tender's announcement (notice) PDF(s) — tender_notice_text
text: Opens (logged-) detail page, finds published Bekanntmachung PDF link(s) returns combined extracted text. Requires logged-session (see vmp_bb_login()); bidder registration needed.

title: Fetch and extract the text of a tender's announcement (notice) PDF(s) — tender_notice_text
code: tender_notice_text(session, detail_url, max_pdfs = 3)

text: session logged-session vmp_bb_session(). detail_url tender's detail URL (Aktion column). max_pdfs Maximum number PDFs read per tender (default 3).

text: combined PDF text (empty string none/!accessible).

what: Log in to Vergabemarktplatz Brandenburg (optional) — vmp_bb_login
title: Log in to Vergabemarktplatz Brandenburg (optional) — vmp_bb_login
text: Logs via Keycloak SSO form. Note: public tender search works without login (see vmp_bb_scrape_tenders()), logging optional.

title: Log in to Vergabemarktplatz Brandenburg (optional) — vmp_bb_login
code: vmp_bb_login(   session,   username = Sys.getenv("VMP_BB_USERNAME"),   password = Sys.getenv("VMP_BB_PASSWORD") )

text: session session vmp_bb_session(). username, password Credentials (default env vars VMP_BB_USERNAME / VMP_BB_PASSWORD).

text: session, invisibly. Errors login rejected.

what: Search for and scrape tender results — vmp_bb_scrape_tenders
title: Search for and scrape tender results — vmp_bb_scrape_tenders
text: Applies filter via portal's deep-link (search state base64 JSON URL hash) scrapes result table across pages. Works without login (search public).

title: Search for and scrape tender results — vmp_bb_scrape_tenders
code: vmp_bb_scrape_tenders(   session,   publication_types = c("ExAnte", "Tender"),   contracting_rules = "VOL",   max_pages = Inf )

title: Search for and scrape tender results — vmp_bb_scrape_tenders
text: session session vmp_bb_session(). publication_types Publication types include. Default c("ExAnte", "Tender") (Beabsichtigte Ausschreibung + Ausschreibung). option: "ExPost" (Vergebener Auftrag). contracting_rules Procurement regulations include. Default "VOL" (VgV / VOL// UVgO). Others: "VOB", "VSVGV", "SEKTVO", "". max_pages Maximum number result pages scrape (default Inf).

title: Search for and scrape tender results — vmp_bb_scrape_tenders
text: tibble one row per tender (pages combined). Aktion column holds project detail URL; Veroeffentlichungstyp column labels row ("Ausschreibung" / "Geplante Ausschreibung").

title: Search for and scrape tender results — vmp_bb_scrape_tenders
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ session <- vmp_bb_session() tenders <- vmp_bb_scrape_tenders(session, max_pages = 2) } # }

what: Start a chromote browser session — vmp_bb_session
title: Start a chromote browser session — vmp_bb_session
text: Creates headless Chrome session via chromote. portal performs cross-origin SSO redirects, direct chromote session handles reliably.

title: Start a chromote browser session — vmp_bb_session
code: vmp_bb_session(headless = TRUE)

title: Start a chromote browser session — vmp_bb_session
text: headless Kept API compatibility. chromote backend always runs headless; FALSE emits note. Use session$view() watch live session browser.

title: Start a chromote browser session — vmp_bb_session
text: chromote::ChromoteSession object.

title: Start a chromote browser session — vmp_bb_session
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ session <- vmp_bb_session() } # }

what: Scrape + score Vergabemarktplatz Brandenburg (portal connector) — vmp_bb_tenders
title: Scrape + score Vergabemarktplatz Brandenburg (portal connector) — vmp_bb_tenders
text: VMP-BB connector screen_portals() / screen_all_portals(): opens chromote session, optionally logs , scrapes tenders, scores (score_relevance()), enriches via detail (optional) notice layers, applies title exclusions (apply_title_excludes()) tags Plattform = "Vergabe Brandenburg". Returns scored tibble (writes report); detail/notice screening caches read/written cache_dir.

title: Scrape + score Vergabemarktplatz Brandenburg (portal connector) — vmp_bb_tenders
code: vmp_bb_tenders(   keywords = tender_keywords(),   login = FALSE,   max_pages = Inf,   publication_types = c("ExAnte", "Tender"),   contracting_rules = "VOL",   screen_details = TRUE,   max_detail = Inf,   screen_notice = FALSE,   max_notice = Inf,   username = Sys.getenv("VMP_BB_USERNAME"),   password = Sys.getenv("VMP_BB_PASSWORD"),   cache_dir = "reports",   headless = TRUE )

title: Scrape + score Vergabemarktplatz Brandenburg (portal connector) — vmp_bb_tenders
text: keywords Keyword list relevance scoring (default tender_keywords()). login Log scraping (default FALSE; search public). max_pages Maximum number result pages scrape (default Inf). publication_types, contracting_rules Search filter passed vmp_bb_scrape_tenders(). screen_details Detail-page layer (default TRUE; see enrich_with_details()). max_detail Maximum number detail pages screen (default Inf). screen_notice Notice-PDF layer (default FALSE; forces login = TRUE; see enrich_with_notice()). max_notice Maximum number new notice PDFs read (default Inf). username, password Credentials login = TRUE (default env vars VMP_BB_USERNAME / VMP_BB_PASSWORD). cache_dir Directory detail/notice caches (default "reports"). headless Run chromote headless (default TRUE).

title: Scrape + score Vergabemarktplatz Brandenburg (portal connector) — vmp_bb_tenders
text: scored tibble Plattform column.

title: Scrape + score Vergabemarktplatz Brandenburg (portal connector) — vmp_bb_tenders
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ vmp_bb_tenders(max_pages = 2) } # }

what: Write a tender overview report (Excel + Markdown + HTML) — write_tender_report
title: Write a tender overview report (Excel + Markdown + HTML) — write_tender_report
text: Writes dated Excel workbook (sheets "Relevant", "Alle", "Neu"), latest.md summary, browsable latest.html (GitHub Pages) small state file used flag tenders new since previous run.

title: Write a tender overview report (Excel + Markdown + HTML) — write_tender_report
code: write_tender_report(   tenders,   dir = "reports",   portal = "vmp-bb",   date = Sys.time() )

title: Write a tender overview report (Excel + Markdown + HTML) — write_tender_report
text: tenders scored tibble (see score_relevance()). dir Output directory (created needed). Default "reports". portal Short portal id used file names. Default "vmp-bb". date Report timestamp (default Sys.time()); date part names files, full timestamp (Europe/Berlin) shows "Stand" line.

title: Write a tender overview report (Excel + Markdown + HTML) — write_tender_report
text: Invisibly, list written file paths counts.

title: Write a tender overview report (Excel + Markdown + HTML) — write_tender_report
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ tenders <- score_relevance(vmp_bb_scrape_tenders(session)) write_tender_report(tenders) } # }
